upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pramlocantI cAnumlocantI cApsarasO' (vA॰saM॰15.17) pramlocati naraM pratyAtmAnaM darSayatIti pramlocantIti mahIDaraH
'ahorAtre tu te te hi pra ca mlocato'nu ca mlocataH' (Sa॰brA॰8.6.1.18) udayete astamayete cetyarTaH
'mAM devA daDire havyavAham apa mluktaM bahu kfcCrA carantam' (f0 10524) apamluktamapakramyAgatam
'sa tata evOzaDInAM mUlAnyupamumloca' (Sa0 brA0 1258) mUlezvantardaDa ityarTaH
